svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 755px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 4. Parallel execution layer: one job per proteome × allele × peptide length

ISO-style legend
Parallelogram = input/output
Rectangle = process
Diamond = decision
Document = file
Cylinder = stored data
Swimlane = system layer
